G

GateController - Class in client.view
The park-gate screen, visible to a PARK_EMPLOYEE only (gated in MainShellController; the server also re-checks the role on every op).

Looks up the park a given staff user manages (via park.manager_id).

getScheduler() - Method in class server.net.OrderServer
The server's timed-job runner — exposed so the server console can wire its manual "run now" triggers to SchedulerService.runNow(String) / SchedulerService.runAllNow().
